summary: Addresses all three warnings from berendt's external review: (1) adds Capabilities.Drop=['ALL'] to restrictedSecurityContext() helper and corresponding test assertion (W-001), (2) adds SecurityContext: restrictedSecurityContext() to the Deployment's keystone-api container (W-002), (3) normalizes field alignment in reconcile_deployment.go (W-003 analog). All 7 containers across 5 builder functions now use the shared helper with all 5 PSS Restricted profile fields. Tests pass, go vet clean.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (go test: ok, 0.660s)
SecurityContext tests exist for all 4 builder functions (db-sync, bootstrap, fernet, credential)
Deployment SecurityContext verified in existing TestReconcileDeployment_DeploymentSpec
Centralized expectRestrictedSecurityContext helper asserts all 5 fields
Edge cases covered (init containers tested alongside main containers)

code_quality_checklist.item: Shared helper prevents drift across builders
Follows existing code patterns (gomega assertions, helper reuse)
Changes are minimal and focused on the feedback items
No dead code or commented-out code

architecture_checklist.item: Single shared helper used by all 7 containers across 5 files
Solution is minimal — only adds the missing field and extends coverage to Deployment

fail_fast_checklist.item: Clusters enforcing PSS Restricted will now accept all pods

defensive_checklist.item: All external inputs validated (N/A — no new external inputs)

issues_found.description: Docstrings on expectRestrictedSecurityContext and TestRestrictedSecurityContext say 'all four PSS Restricted profile fields' but now check five fields (REQ-001 through REQ-005 including Capabilities.Drop). The docstring references should say 'all five' and the REQ range in expectRestrictedSecurityContext should be 'REQ-001 through REQ-005'.
issues_found.fix: Update 'all four' to 'all five' in both docstrings; update 'REQ-001 through REQ-004' to 'REQ-001 through REQ-005' in expectRestrictedSecurityContext docstring.

suggested_improvements: Update docstring count from 'four' to 'five' PSS Restricted profile fields in security_context_test.go (lines 30 and 61) to reflect the addition of Capabilities.Drop
